codeReview.summary: The feature only adds one app-level test covering fresh-live, stale-allowed, and stale-disallowed transitions. It does not cover the seeded-bootstrap or zero-live completed-boot cross-surface assertions required by the feature contract, so regressions in those states would pass unnoticed.

issues.description: The new cross-surface coherence test exercises fresh-live, stale-allowed, and stale-disallowed only. The feature description and validation contract also require cross-surface coherence for seeded bootstrap (VAL-CROSS-004/007) and zero-live completed-boot behavior (VAL-CROSS-008), but this commit adds no end-to-end coverage for those states, leaving the stated feature requirements unverified.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit dfb3dcb, transcript skeleton, mission docs, and trust-slice skill. Found a blocking gap: the implementation is test-only and does not actually cover all required cross-surface states, specifically seeded-bootstrap and zero-live completed-boot coherence.
